label: Part 03
text: Jack looked up at the pale blue sky, and he said, "I came from Heaven." "My goodness!", she said. "Did you see my husband there?" (The farmer's wife was talking about her first husband, the man who had died). "Oh yes, I got to know him well when I was staying in Heaven," said Jack. "And how is he doing?", asked the woman. "He is fine," replied the old soldier.

sentences.en: Jack looked up at the pale blue sky,
sentences.pt: Jack olhou para o céu azul claro,
sentences.ptbr: djék lúkt âp et de pêil blú skái

sentences.en: and he said, "I came from Heaven."
sentences.pt: e ele disse, "eu vim do céu".
sentences.ptbr: end ri séd, ái kêim frâm réven
did iú sí mái râzband dér?

sentences.en: The farmer's wife was talking about her first husband,
sentences.pt: A esposa do fazendeiro estava falando sobre o primeiro marido dela,
sentences.ptbr: de fármers uáif uóz tókin abáut rer fârst râzband

sentences.en: "Oh yes, I got to know him well
sentences.ptbr: ôu iés, ái gót tu nôu rim uél

sentences.en: when I was staying in Heaven," said Jack.
sentences.pt: quando eu estava passando um tempo no céu", disse Jack.
sentences.ptbr: uén ái uóz stêiin in réven, séd djék

sentences.en: "And how is he doing?", asked the woman.
sentences.pt: "E como ele está?", perguntou a mulher.
sentences.ptbr: end ráu iz ri dúin? éskt de uúman

sentences.en: "He is fine," replied the old soldier.
sentences.pt: "Ele está bem", respondeu o velho soldado.
sentences.ptbr: ri iz fáin, ripláid di ôuld sôuldjer
